<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete project API key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/projects/{project}/tokens/{token_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes an API key and immediately removes it.
